NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT VIDEOEGG'S INC.'S, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1112(A) AND THE COURT TAKES THE ABSENCE OF A MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AS ADMITTING THE DEMURRER IS NOT MERITORIOUS. C R C 3.1113(A). IN ANY EVENT IT IS NOT MERITORIOUS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
